canonical_name: one of the kings of Tara
a High King, who must also seat his well-born Companions
an old man, three times her age
a tent pitched on a carefully chosen dry spot
a woman whose heart was already given
maidens ready to love him and wed him
the hordes of men coming and going
the site of an old Roman fort
the slopes covered with tents and people
the men who came with you
some place better suited for our home
the whole slope of the hill
the followers of Lot of Orkney
his hostess and keeper of his house-
those who were unable to fight for themselves
